overall.description: Cinematic game engine footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a first-person drive through desolate outskirts toward a large illuminated NC sign at night, with atmospheric fog, teal color grading, and flying vehicles overhead.

events.description: camera begins turning left to navigate around the billboard structure

agents.ego_description: driving through dark terrain toward a large billboard with distant city lights visible on the left horizon

entered.detail: large rectangular billboard mounted on tall metal support beams
distant illuminated buildings and industrial smokestacks creating an orange glow on the horizon
horizontal lines of white vehicle lights on an elevated highway

segments.scene_description: The camera drives forward through dark, desolate terrain toward a large billboard structure. In the distance to the left, the glowing lights of a futuristic city skyline are visible along with streaks of traffic on an elevated highway, all rendered with atmospheric fog and a cool teal color grade.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching neon-lit city entrance sign with aerial traffic

events.description: passes the billboard and reveals the large illuminated NC sign structure ahead
flying vehicles appear overhead against the night sky

agents.ego_description: continuing forward toward the glowing red NC sign as flying cars pass overhead in the distance

notable_agents.action: flying vehicle moving across the night sky above the NC sign

entered.detail: massive industrial structure with bright red neon NC lettering
silhouettes of aerial traffic and flying cars against the dark sky

segments.scene_description: Having passed the billboard, the camera now drives toward a massive industrial structure emblazoned with red neon NC letters. The terrain remains dark and desolate, but flying vehicles begin to appear overhead, silhouetted against the night sky as they traverse the airspace above the city entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward drive through a desolate wasteland that gradually converges upon the glowing entrance of a futuristic metropolis. It begins by traversing dark, empty terrain toward a large billboard, while the distant city skyline and streaks of highway traffic glimmer through a cool teal fog. As the camera passes the billboard, the perspective shifts toward a massive industrial structure dominated by red neon NC lettering. The scene then expands to reveal flying vehicles silhouetted against the night sky, gliding overhead as the vehicle approaches the illuminated city threshold.
